title: Zodiac Mandala Coloring
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Where the stars meet the page.

This 126-page zodiac mandala coloring book blends two of the most beloved themes in adult coloring - sacred-geometry mandalas and the 12 astrological signs - into a single meditative practice that's as beautiful as it is calming.

Who it's for:
- Adult coloring enthusiasts ready for intricate, statement-piece designs
- Astrology lovers and spiritual seekers
- Anyone using coloring as a meditation, journaling, or shadow-work tool
- Gift-givers shopping for the witchy, woo-curious, or zodiac-obsessed

What's inside:
- 50+ original mandala designs, each one tied to a zodiac sign and its symbolism
- Aries through Pisces: ruling planet, element, archetype, and key glyphs woven into the geometry
- Mix of detailed mandalas and softer, simpler patterns - color matched to your mood
- Large 8.5 x 11 inch format with single-sided pages so markers won't bleed through
- Short astrology insight at the start of each sign's section

Whether Mercury is in retrograde or you just need a quiet hour, this book centers you. Pick your sign, light a candle, color one mandala. Notice what shifts.

Order today and bring the zodiac to your fingertips.
categories: BISAC: BODY, MIND & SPIRIT / Astrology / General
